summary: Comprehensive testing of Sugar City Sweeps platform completed successfully. All major issues from iteration 1 have been resolved. Backend APIs are fully functional including admin endpoints. Frontend UI is excellent with smooth user experience and all core flows working perfectly.

resolved_from_iteration_1.status: ✅ RESOLVED - Admin authentication now working correctly
resolved_from_iteration_1.details: All admin endpoints (/admin/users, /admin/stats, /admin/transactions) now return 200 status with proper data

resolved_from_iteration_1.issue: Registration form submission not working - stays on registration page
resolved_from_iteration_1.status: ✅ RESOLVED - Registration now redirects to dashboard successfully
resolved_from_iteration_1.details: Form submission works correctly with proper validation and redirect flow

minor_issues.issue: Console 404 errors when accessing support tab

passed_tests: ✅ Games list retrieval (7 games: Fire Kirin, Juwa, Juwa 2, Ultra Panda, Panda Master, Orion Stars, Game Vault)
✅ AMOE status check and daily claim functionality (100 free credits)
✅ Payment info endpoints (BTC/Lightning crypto + Cash App card info)
✅ Admin endpoints: users list, dashboard stats, transactions
✅ Frontend login page with proper form elements and data-testids
✅ Admin login flow with dashboard redirect
✅ Dashboard navigation - all 7 tabs clickable (Games, Deposit, Redeem, Withdraw, History, Settings, Support)
✅ Games display with 7 game cards and download buttons
✅ AMOE banner with free credits claim button
✅ Admin panel accessibility with all admin tabs working
✅ Registration form with all required fields and validation
✅ Registration success flow with dashboard redirect
✅ Deposit functionality with all 3 payment methods (Stripe, Crypto, Cash Cards)
✅ Dual currency balance display (Sugar Tokens + Game Credits)
✅ Responsive design with mobile menu support

low_priority: Fix minor 404 console errors in support tab (non-critical)
Consider adding loading states for better UX during API calls
recommendations: Platform is production-ready with live Stripe integration
All core sweepstakes functionality working correctly
Excellent user experience with proper legal compliance (AMOE)
Admin panel fully functional for platform management
